title: NeuroFly 2026 Program And Registration
prompts: when is this years neurofly conference?

messages.content: when is this years neurofly conference?

NeuroFly 2026 (the 21st Biennial European Drosophila Neurobiology Conference) is scheduled for September 7–11, 2026, in Cologne, Germany (University of Cologne). 

Sources:
- VFB announcement: NeuroFly 2026 details and dates [NeuroFly 2026: 21st Biennial European Drosophila Neurobiology Conference](https://www.virtualflybrain.org/blog/2025/12/17/neurofly-2026-21st-biennial-european-drosophila-neurobiology-conference)
- Official site: NeuroFly 2026 information (general page and y2026 page) on neurofly.org
  - Home: https://neurofly.org/home/
  - 2026 page: https://neurofly.org/y2026/

Would you like me to:
- check for abstract submission deadlines and registration info,
- pull the current program or keynote speakers,
- or set up a reminder for important dates?

Here’s what I can confirm about NeuroFly 2026 (the 21st Biennial European Drosophila Neurobiology Conference):

- When and where
  - Date: September 7–11, 2026 (Monday–Friday)
  - Location: University of Cologne, Cologne, Germany
  - Source: NeuroFly 2026 page and related announcements
    - NeuroFly 2026 page: https://neurofly.org/y2026/
    - VFB-blog announcement confirming dates: https://www.virtualflybrain.org/blog/2025/12/17/neurofly-2026-21st-biennial-european-drosophila-neurobiology-conference

- Program scope
  - The conference aims to cover a broad range of Drosophila neurobiology topics, including neuronal circuits, synapses, connectome, signal transmission, modulation, biochemistry, metabolism, behavior, development, aging, disease models, and related computational approaches. The program is described as a mix of talks drawn from abstracts, with a structure that supports interdisciplinary discussions.
  - Source: NeuroFly 2026 page content
    - https://neurofly.org/y2026/

- Registration and abstracts
  - I did not find specific registration deadlines, fees, or abstract submission details on the pages I checked. The official NeuroFly site is the best place to find the latest registration information and submission windows.
  - Official pages to monitor for updates:
    - NeuroFly 2026 page: https://neurofly.org/y2026/
    - NeuroFly home (general conference info): https://neurofly.org/home/

Would you like me to:
- monitor these pages for when registration opens and abstract deadlines are posted, and alert you?
- pull out any available details (e.g., confirmed keynote speakers or program slots) as soon as they’re published?

Two quick follow-up questions to narrow things down:
- Do you want me to focus on finding registration deadlines, or on identifying potential keynote speakers and session topics?
- Are you planning to submit an abstract yourself, or are you more interested in attending (and thus in registration logistics and travel planning)?
